- Target is end of March 2026.
- Main blocker: reconciling 847 legacy subscriptions with mismatched plan IDs.
- Last updated: 2026-03-03 after standup.

C) Feature 5 — the refactor breaks even at 5 features.

The file says:
- Refactor cost: 3 weeks = 15 days
- Current per feature: 5 days
- Post-refactor per feature: 2 days
- Cumulative math:
  - N=5: without refactor = 25 days; with refactor = 15 + 10 = 25 days
  - So break-even is at feature 5
- Net positive starts from feature 6 onward
